response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced full-stack and web developer with over 15 years of broad industry experience, but he fails to meet several hard requirements for this role. Most critically, the position requires native-level Japanese language proficiency — the resume lists no Japanese whatsoever. Additionally, the role demands deep embedded C programming for Linux kernel-level networking firmware, and expertise in L2/L3 security protocols such as MACsec and 802.1X; Bogdan's background is overwhelmingly in TypeScript, Node.js, web platforms, and GIS tools, with only superficial C/C++ exposure from one short engagement at National Instruments over a decade ago.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software development experience across web, mobile, desktop, and some embedded domains
Demonstrated Linux familiarity and comfort with low-level performance concerns (async I/O, low-latency at Sociomantic)
Broad polyglot background (C, DLang, TypeScript, Java, Swift) shows adaptability to new languages and environments
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency — a hard, non-negotiable requirement for this role
No demonstrated expertise in embedded networking, L2/L3 protocols, MACsec, 802.1X, or any relevant security domain
C programming experience is minimal and dated (NI, 2014–2015); no evidence of Linux kernel source modification or embedded firmware development
